zh.lifeSummary: 當Johannes John Routson於1768年12月21日出生在美國賓夕法尼亞州貝可斯時，他的父親Johannes John Rauenzahner31歲，母親Elisabeth Margaretha Repp27歲。他和Anna Maria Kufer至少有1個兒子。他去世於1816年12月在美國俄亥俄州可倫比納亞享年48歲。

nameMeanings.name: Routson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: History: The progenitor of the Routsons (and Routzahns) was Johann Ludwig Rauenzahner from Germany, who in the middle of the 18th century settled in PA.

variants.name: Routzahn
meanings: Americanized form of German Rauenzahner: probably a nickname for someone with very irregular or ugly teeth, from Middle High German rouch, rūch ‘rough, hairy, unkempt’ + zant ‘tooth’ + -er agent suffix. The surname Rauenzahner has died out in Germany. Compare Routson .
History: The progenitor of the Routzahns (and Routsons) was Johann Ludwig Rauenzahner from Germany, who in the middle of the 18th century settled in PA.

nameMeanings.name: Johannes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.description: Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.
The Declaration of Independence was signed in Philadelphia on July 4, 1776. The liberty bell was first rung here to Celebrate this important document.

historicEvents.title: The First Constitution
historicEvents.description: Serving the newly created United States of America as the first constitution, the Articles of Confederation were an agreement among the 13 original states preserving the independence and sovereignty of the states. But with a limited central government, the Constitutional Convention came together to replace the Articles of Confederation with a more established Constitution and central government on where the states can be represented and voice their concerns and comments to build up the nation.

historicEvents.title: Second State to Ratify U.S. Constitution
historicEvents.description: On December 12, 1787, Pennsylvania ratified the U.S. Constitution.

historicEvents.title: Creating the Eleventh Amendment
historicEvents.description: The Eleventh Amendment restricts the ability of any people to start a lawsuit against the states in federal court.
Ohio was the first state admitted to the Union from the Northwest Territory.

historicEvents.title: Change of capital city
historicEvents.description: Zanesville becomes the new state capital.

en.lifeSummary: When Johannes John Routson was born on 21 December 1768, in Berks, Pennsylvania, United States, his father, Johannes John Rauenzahner, was 31 and his mother, Elisabeth Margaretha Repp, was 27. He had at least 1 son with Anna Maria Kufer. He died in December 1816, in Columbiana, Ohio, United States, at the age of 48.

Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Anna Maria Kufer. Il est décédé en décembre 1816, à Columbiana, Ohio, États-Unis, à l’âge de 48 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Johannes John Routsonが1768年12月21日にアメリカ合衆国ペンシルベニア州バークスで生まれた時，父Johannes John Rauenzahnerは31歳，母Elisabeth Margaretha Reppは27歳であった。彼はAnna Maria Kuferとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1816年12月にアメリカ合衆国オハイオ州コルンビアナで48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Johannes John Routson(이)가 1768년 12월 21일 미국 펜실베이니아 주 버크스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Johannes John Rauenzahner(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Elisabeth Margaretha Repp(은)는 27세였다. 그는 Anna Maria Kufer(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1816년 12월 미국 오하이오 주 콜럼비아나에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Johannes John Routson родился 21 декабря 1768 г. в местности биркс, Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты, его отцу по имени Johannes John Rauenzahner было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Elisabeth Margaretha Repp, 27. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Anna Maria Kufer. Он умер декабрь 1816 г. в местности колумбяна, Огайо, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 48 лет.
